Mini minutes include the Rulings for all the motions before the court on Oct-16-08.
1.) Defendant's motion to compel Christine Adams to respond to deposition questions, Granted. Deposition to take place on Nov-12-08. Deposition costs and expediated fees ordering transcript are to be paid by Ms. Adams. Ms. Adams is sanctioned in the amount of $500.00

At the hearings the Court also determines there is a hold on discovery until 7 days after the jury returns its verdict on the Adams v. Lucky case.
